violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Boxes of food stored in freezer contain condensation.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Observed fish thawing in container of water.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface was not disassembled for proper cleaning. Observed food build up on food prep area.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Ventilation hood does not cover gas stove.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed grease buildup on and around cooking equipment. Dishwashing area needs to be cleaned more frequent.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed grease build up on filters of ventalition hood.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed build up of debris on floor, wall and ceilings.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Door open without protection against insects and rodents.
